headline: MKC Stock Outlook Hinges on Pricing Power and Flavor Demand Trends
summary: MKC's outlook rests on resilient flavor demand, pricing discipline and margin gains, while soft volumes and modest organic growth keep investors watching.

raw.headline: MKC Stock Outlook Hinges on Pricing Power and Flavor Demand Trends

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks We Steer Clear Of
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

raw.headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks We Steer Clear Of

headline: Kraft Heinz bet inflation peaked, but your cookout bill disagrees
summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) walked away from a planned corporate breakup in February and redirected that energy into a $600 million investment in its own brands. That decision rests on one specific assumption: that the worst of commodity inflation was already behind the company. Data published this week by ...
